(5:27) DOJ considers breaking up Google after last week's antitrust ruling (28:10) Starbucks replaces CEO with Chipotle chief (45:37) Work culture, WFH's damage to informal mentorship (59:20) Election update: Harris flips the polls despite unclear policy; reports of price control focus (1:21:27)...

chunks.text: Bestie intros: Jason gets a dish named after him!
DOJ considers breaking up Google after last week's antitrust ruling
Starbucks replaces CEO with Chipotle chief
Work culture, WFH's damage to informal mentorship
Election update: Harris flips the polls despite unclear policy; reports of price control focus
Boeing's Starliner disaster strands two astronauts in space
